name: Ranma RPG January 4, 2026
description:
In the land of Japan in the late 80's to the early 90's, a place where springs of magic give curses to those unlucky enough to fall into them, you exist.

Following you, Ranma Saotome, Akane Tendo, Ryoga Hibiki, Shampoo, and many more, you embark on this journey full of martial arts and spring curses.

Please use the chat memory function to tell the AI if you are one of the characters or if you're your own as well as the curse you might have if you have any, have fun!
creator: Buraddo
